setting: A customer making a customized order at a coffee shop.
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walking into the shop to start my day
Waiting in line, knowing exactly what to say
Can I get a medium iced latte, please?
Trying to catch a little morning breeze

[Chorus]
Could I get it with oat milk?
And go light on the ice
Just one pump of vanilla
Yeah, that sounds really nice
Customizing my coffee, exactly how I please
A perfect little moment, putting my mind at ease

[Verse 2]
What kind of milk would you like with that?
The barista smiles, a quick little chat
Can I get a blueberry muffin warmed up too?
A sweet little treat before the morning is through

[Chorus]
Could I get it with oat milk?
And go light on the ice
Just one pump of vanilla
Yeah, that sounds really nice
Customizing my coffee, exactly how I please
A perfect little moment, putting my mind at ease

[Bridge]
That'll be seven-fifty, for here or to go?
To go, here's my card, ready for the show
We'll have it ready down at the end of the line
Taking a sip, and it tastes so fine

[Outro]
Just one pump of vanilla.
Go light on the ice.
Exactly how I please.
(Fade out)

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 1]
Walking into the shop to start my day
lyricsJa.ja: 一日を始めるために、お店へと足を踏み入れる

lyricsJa.en: Waiting in line, knowing exactly what to say
lyricsJa.ja: 列に並びながら、オーダーする言葉は決まっている

lyricsJa.en: Can I get a medium iced latte, please?
lyricsJa.ja: 「アイスラテのMサイズをお願いできますか？」

lyricsJa.en: Trying to catch a little morning breeze
lyricsJa.ja: 朝の爽やかな風を少しだけつかまえたくて

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Could I get it with oat milk?
lyricsJa.ja: 「オーツミルクに変更できますか？」

lyricsJa.en: And go light on the ice
lyricsJa.ja: 「あと、氷は少なめで」

lyricsJa.en: Just one pump of vanilla
lyricsJa.ja: 「バニラシロップを1プッシュだけ」

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, that sounds really nice
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、それって最高にいい感じだ

lyricsJa.en: Customizing my coffee, exactly how I please
lyricsJa.ja: 自分の思い通りに、コーヒーをカスタマイズする

lyricsJa.en: A perfect little moment, putting my mind at ease
lyricsJa.ja: 心がほっと安らぐ、完璧なささやかな時間

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 2]
What kind of milk would you like with that?
lyricsJa.ja: 「ミルクの種類はどうなさいますか？」

lyricsJa.en: The barista smiles, a quick little chat
lyricsJa.ja: バリスタは微笑んで、ちょっとした言葉を交わす

lyricsJa.en: Can I get a blueberry muffin warmed up too?
lyricsJa.ja: 「ブルーベリーマフィンも温めてもらえますか？」

lyricsJa.en: A sweet little treat before the morning is through
lyricsJa.ja: この朝が終わる前に、ささやかな甘いご褒美を

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Could I get it with oat milk?
lyricsJa.ja: 「オーツミルクに変更できますか？」

lyricsJa.en: And go light on the ice
lyricsJa.ja: 「あと、氷は少なめで」

lyricsJa.en: Just one pump of vanilla
lyricsJa.ja: 「バニラシロップを1プッシュだけ」

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, that sounds really nice
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、それって最高にいい感じだ

lyricsJa.en: Customizing my coffee, exactly how I please
lyricsJa.ja: 自分の思い通りに、コーヒーをカスタマイズする

lyricsJa.en: A perfect little moment, putting my mind at ease
lyricsJa.ja: 心がほっと安らぐ、完璧なささやかな時間

lyricsJa.en: [Bridge]
That'll be seven-fifty, for here or to go?
lyricsJa.ja: 「7ドル50セントになります。店内でお召し上がりですか、お持ち帰りですか？」

lyricsJa.en: To go, here's my card, ready for the show
lyricsJa.ja: 「持ち帰りで。カードで払います」 さあ、自分のステージへ向かう準備をしよう

lyricsJa.en: We'll have it ready down at the end of the line
lyricsJa.ja: 「カウンターの奥でドリンクをお出ししますね」

lyricsJa.en: Taking a sip, and it tastes so fine
lyricsJa.ja: 一口飲めば、素晴らしい味わいが広がるんだ

lyricsJa.en: [Outro]
Just one pump of vanilla.
lyricsJa.ja: バニラを1プッシュだけ。

lyricsJa.en: Go light on the ice.
lyricsJa.ja: 氷は少なめで。

lyricsJa.en: Exactly how I please.
lyricsJa.ja: 思い描いた通りの味に。

lyricsJa.en: (Fade out)
lyricsJa.ja: (フェードアウト)

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Hi, can I get a medium iced latte, please?
sentences.displayHtml: Hi, can I get a medium iced latte, please?

conversation.japanese: こんにちは。アイスラテのMサイズ（ミディアム）をお願いできますか？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: What kind of milk would you like with that?
sentences.displayHtml: What kind of milk would you like with that?

conversation.japanese: かしこまりました。ミルクの種類はどうなさいますか？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Could I get it with oat milk?
sentences.displayHtml: Could I get it with oat milk?

sentences.text: And also, can you go light on the ice?
sentences.displayHtml: And also, can you go light on the ice?

conversation.japanese: オーツミルクに変更できますか？あと、氷は少なめでお願いします。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Do you want any flavor syrups in there?
sentences.displayHtml: Do you want any flavor syrups in there?

conversation.japanese: オーツミルクで氷少なめですね。フレーバーシロップなどは追加しますか？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Just one pump of vanilla, please.
sentences.displayHtml: Just one pump of vanilla, please.

sentences.text: Oh, and can I get a blueberry muffin warmed up?
sentences.displayHtml: Oh, and can I get a blueberry muffin warmed up?

conversation.japanese: バニラシロップを1プッシュだけお願いします。あ、それとブルーベリーマフィンを温めてもらえますか？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Is this for here or to go?
sentences.displayHtml: Is this for here or to go?

conversation.japanese: もちろんです。お会計は7ドル50セントになります。店内でお召し上がりですか、お持ち帰りですか？

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.japanese: 持ち帰りで。カードで払います。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: We'll have your drink ready at the end of the counter!
sentences.displayHtml: We'll have your drink ready at the end of the counter!

conversation.japanese: ありがとうございます。カウンターの奥でドリンクをお出ししますね！
